title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Marketplace Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
